Name: VeriSign Inc
Description: Verisign Inc. is an American company based in Reston, Virginia, United States that operates a diverse array of network infrastructure, including two of the Internet's thirteen root nameservers. Verisign also offers a range of security services, including managed DNS, distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack mitigation and cyber-threat reporting.
Address: 12061 BLUEMONT WAY, RESTON, VA, UNITED STATES, 20190
